sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ عُمَرُ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ يَقْرَأُ كِتَابَهُ الْمُفَضَّلَ.
sentences.translation: Omer je sjedio u parku i čitao svoju omiljenu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: Omar sat in the garden reading his favorite book.

sentences.translation: Njegov prijatelj Sami je došao i sjeo pored njega.
sentences.translationEn: His friend Sami came and sat beside him.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ سَامِي عَنِ الْكِتَابِ فَأَخْبَرَهُ عُمَرُ بِقِصَّتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Sami je pitao za knjigu pa mu je Omer ispričao priču.
sentences.translationEn: Sami asked about the book and Omar told him its story.

sentences.arabic: أَعَارَ عُمَرُ الْكِتَابَ لِسَامِي بَعْدَ أَنْ يَنْتَهِيَ مِنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Omer je odlučio posuditi Samiju knjigu kad završi s njom.
sentences.translationEn: Omar lent Sami the book after he finishes reading it.
